mentions.note: Caller (Jamon, Chicago) asked about CEO conviction and insider selling. Cramer likes Affirm, likes Max Levchin, stock fell way too much at attractive levels. Pull the trigger if under $50.
Heavy insider selling ($160M Aug–Jan) but Cramer likes below $50; fundamentals solid despite executive exits.
Pure-play buy-now-pay-later pioneer with transparent lending model; relationships with best brands (Amazon, Shopify, Costco); cleaner way to play fintech than Bread's subprime mix.
Terrific quarter: GMV +35%, revenue +33%, strong net income; powerful AI underwriting engine; American consumer showing resilience with steady transactions.
